production_down.name: Production is down!
production_down.description: FLOPS halved for 30s. Mash keys to fix it faster (each key -1s).

hackathon.name: Hackathon!
hackathon.description: Double LoC production for 20s. Ship it!

investor_demo.name: Investor Demo
investor_demo.description: VCs are watching. Pitch your vision — but choose wisely.

stackoverflow_down.name: Stack Overflow is down
stackoverflow_down.description: Half typing speed for 15s. How do you even code?

github_star.name: GitHub Star
github_star.description: Someone starred your repo! Small cash bonus.

coffee_spill.name: Coffee Spill
coffee_spill.description: You spilled coffee on your keyboard. -50% typing speed for 10s.

npm_install.name: npm install
npm_install.description: Installing dependencies... FLOPS consumed by node_modules for 20s.

viral_tweet.name: Viral Tweet
viral_tweet.description: Your hot take went viral. Devs flock to your project. +100% auto-LoC for 15s.

ai_hallucination.name: AI Hallucination
ai_hallucination.description: One of your AI models went rogue. It wrote 10K LoC of nonsense. Quality -10%.

security_audit.name: Security Audit
security_audit.description: Auditors found vulnerabilities. Pay 5% of cash or lose 20% quality.

power_outage.name: Power Outage
power_outage.description: Data center went dark. No FLOPS for 15s. Manual typing still works.

acquihire_offer.name: Acqui-hire Offer
acquihire_offer.description: Big Tech wants to buy you out. Sell for a permanent edge, or stay indie?

dev_burnout.name: Dev Burnout
dev_burnout.description: Your developers are exhausted. Token production -50% for 30s.
